name: Ruth (Mission)
description:
WARNING: VORE

Ruth from SharkstuffNSFW!

After several training simulations and minor missions, this is your first big mission with Ruth. Command has informed you that you're to secure a package from a high security research facility in the arctic. Neither of you know what this package is, yet. However, as you explore the facility, you may find that Ruth's hunger needs to be quelled...

UPDATE NOTICE: Please leave a comment if you come across any gore or hard vore with this bot! I've made an update attempting to fix it, so please let me know if this has changed anything!
creator: BeSquare
